_comment: DCAT-AP-SE overrides to the EU DCAT-AP 3.0 SHACL shapes. Each entry lists a (path, constraintType) pair that should be filtered out of the SHACL validation report because the Swedish profile diverges from EU. Read by RDFValidator. Source for SE rules: https://docs.dataportal.se/dcat/3.0.1/en/

overrides.reason: SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: nodetype URI + pattern, no rdf:type required.
SE template: dataset reference can be a bare IRI.
SE template: vcard:Organization/Individual/Kind, not strictly vcard:Kind.
SE template: nodetype LITERAL for dcterms:format. String values like 'application/json' are accepted in SE.
DCAT-AP-SE accepts string identifiers for adms:identifier. EU SHACL requires a typed adms:Identifier node.
DCAT-AP-SE uses odrs:RightsStatement for rights statements. EU SHACL requires dc:RightsStatement.
